SEARCH

Uses of Package
qsim

Packages that use qsim
Package
Description
qsim
Qsim - Multiline screening simulation application
qsim.gui
GUI interface for the simulator
  • Classes in qsim used by qsim
    Class
    Description
    Parameters
    Model parameters and algorithm parameters.
    Parameters.CountCurrentlyScreened
    The legal values for the configuration parameter "policy.countCurrentlyScreened", which is used to control how the customer that's currently being screened is counted for the purposes of measuring the queue length
    Parameters.ParseException
    Thrown when an error is found in the config file
    Parameters.Policy
    The available policies for the selection of screener profiles
    ParseConfig
    This class is used to obtain configuration paramters, from a configuration file or from Java System Properties.
    Policy
    A policy determines how we choose the screener profile for each lane that has multiple profiles available.
    PolicyP2
    Paul's policy P2 provides for dynamic assignment of lanes to screening profiles.
    PolicyP2.Group
    A Group instance describes all lanes with the same set of profiles.
    Qsim
    The main queue simulator class; simulates the behaviour of a battery of L lines
    Qsim.ProgressDisplay
    This may be subclassed to provide necessary functionality
    Queue
    A Queue object simulates a single screening lane.
    Queue.Arrival
    Encapsulates the information about a customer and his progress through the screening lane
    Queue.ArrivalBase
     
    ScreenerProfile
    Describes a screener profile (performance and detection rate).
    ScreenerProfile.Shape
    The shape of the screener profile (uniform or triangular)
    StaticArrivalSchedule
    A precomputed customer arrival schedule
  • Classes in qsim used by qsim.gui
    Class
    Description
    Qsim
    The main queue simulator class; simulates the behaviour of a battery of L lines
    Qsim.ProgressDisplay
    This may be subclassed to provide necessary functionality
    Queue
    A Queue object simulates a single screening lane.
